There is still room at the Vineyard and on the  shuttle! We have ten =

a friend and join us!!! How can you resist!!!   http://www.alexandervalley.org/first.html 
Sunday
November  4th
9:30am (shuttle leaves at 10:00am)
2367 Bay Street (between Broderick  & Baker - parking on Baker near =
Palace of Fine Arts)
$45 (or less  per person for shuttle)
Merlot's (and a stop for Zinfandel at Seghesio) and  Food (vegetable =
lasagna, chocolate truffles, roasted eggplant soup and  more....)
MJ :)

  Subject: First Weekend in Alexander Valley - Marvolous  Merlot - Sunday =
November 4th 10:00 - 5:00
  Thought  everyone could use a day drinking wine and enjoying the =
scenery of the  Alexander Valley.
  Wanted to gauge the interest and availability of  friends interested in =
partaking in this winery event.  There will be  complimentary wine =
tasting and food provided at four vineyards in Alexander  Valley. =20
  Please see the attached website for details.  =20
  http://www.alexandervalley.org/first.html 
   If there are enough people interested I was thinking of arranging the  
rental of a party van/shuttle bus for the day Sunday November 4th, from  
10:00 - 5:00 leaving from my house in the Marina.  After talking with  a =
few limo companies, the price per person for limo/shuttle service will  
probably be around $50 - $60 for the day.
  Please let me know  tomorrow if you are available and interested in =
participating.=20
   Please forward this email to others I may have missed on the list too!
